Server default max output and max context are distinct and map to correct CLI flags
Panel settings keep DSV4 cache, max output, and max context controls unambiguous

requirements.requirement: MiMo V2.5 JANG_2L runtime/tool/long-prompt quality is release-cleared
requirements.caveat: MiMo V2.5 JANG_2L has current structural, narrow text/cache, selected-expert parity, exact CB cache/L2 proof, native thinking-off prompt proof, and the current JANGTQ2 packaged decode-speed floor when the audit reports it. Remaining open items: corrected MiMo artifact/upload or runtime decode proof, tool/JSON literal exactness, decode speed, VL/audio/video wiring. Do not release-clear MiMo from short smokes or speed-only proof.

model_upload_action_reasons: JANGTQ_2 current artifact fails plain, structured JSON, and parsed tool-argument literal exactness before parser or JSON repair; rebuild/reupload with a less lossy literal-safe profile unless source-vs-quant proves a runtime decode bug

requirements.requirement: N2 Pro 397B JANG1L/JANGTQ runtime/cache/API/UI quality is release-cleared
requirements.caveat: N2 Pro 397B JANG1L/JANGTQ is now tracked as an explicit release blocker. The current no-heavy parser/cache/family policy contracts are present, the local JANG_1L model/index preflight is registered, and current-source plus real Electron dev-app probes have loaded JANG_1L on the 128 GB host. Treat JANG_1L as careful-RAM live-proof work, not permanent model infeasibility; do not sign, notarize, tag, or publish a release claiming N2 support until both quant profiles pass the same live runtime/cache/API/UI gates as the other release-critical families.

local_artifact_probe.boundary: The local N2 JANG_1L artifact/index is registered, but the current memory preflight is only a launch-safety warning. JANG_1L should be treated as careful-RAM live-proof work, not permanent infeasibility; this is not live runtime proof.

harness_contract.prompt: Reply with exactly N2_JANG1L_VISIBLE and no other text.

jang1l_real_ui_one_turn.release_boundary: This one-turn proof avoids the prior second-turn working-set guard but still fails visible output: N2 JANG_1L streamed whitespace only. It proves live load/cache/L2/autodetect surfaces, not release support, multi-turn cache reuse, tools, Responses, or visible quality.

red.second_turn_error: Metal GPU working set too full (102% of 107.5GB cap)

boundary: This proves N2 JANG_1L can load and execute one bounded real Electron dev-app Chat request.
It does not prove usable visible output quality: the first assistant content was whitespace/empty.
It does not prove multi-turn cache reuse: the second turn was rejected by the Metal working-set guard at 102% of the 107.5GB cap.
It does not clear tools, Responses, Responses stream, L2 restart, media, installed-app parity, public tunnel parity, package/sign/notarize/tag/upload/download, or release support.

jangtq2_live_proof.boundary: Current-source N2 JANGTQ2 chat/cache/Responses proof only. This does not clear N2 JANG_1L, installed-app/UI parity, media rows, or full release support.

jangtq2_l2_restart_proof.boundary: Current-source N2 JANGTQ2 fresh-process L2 restart proof only. This does not clear N2 JANG_1L, installed-app/UI parity, media rows, same-model tunnel parity, or full release support.

This supports the checkpoint candidate profile but does not clear stricter long-delta prompts, audio, public tunnel parity, N2 JANG_1L, or full release support.

case_summaries.name: chat_off_no_punct_rep1
responses_on

direct_off_exactness_boundary.root_boundary: Direct/off DSV4 exact-code generation fails under thinking_closed while requested-thinking exactness passes under thinking_open; hidden force-on does not clear explicit direct/off quality.

exact_code_root_boundary.root_boundary: Current DSV4 exact-code evidence points at explicit direct/off rail exact-code generation, not template mismatch, hidden reasoning leakage, prefix cache, forced sampling controls, or bundle defaults. Requested-thinking success is diagnostic only; the current logit boundary is at THREE. / identifier continuation, and live prompt-boundary bisection is same-rail wording-sensitive but its passing rows are not direct/off clearance when they run on the effective thinking-open rail.
